testcase.name: test_bulk_grid_update_returns_queued_count_field

failure.message:
AssertionError: Expected 200, got 502: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up.
assert 502 == 200 + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_hr_push_queue.py:201: in test_bulk_grid_update_returns_queued_count_field assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 502: The preview environment is not responding. It may be starting up. E E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_queue_status_after_rate_limited_push
testcase.failure: tests/test_hr_push_queue.py:312: in test_queue_status_after_rate_limited_push assert update_response.status_code == 200 E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code
